description: Process a customer return for Alex Mercer in Vtiger CRM. Update invoice 'INV-ECO-994' to 'Cancel' status with a comment explaining the cancellation (must include 'Return' or 'Refund'). Document the RMA by creating a closed, high-priority Trouble Ticket titled 'RMA' or 'Return' associated with Alex Mercer and 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)'. Restock the returned item by increasing the 'Qty in Stock' for 'Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)' by exactly 1.
